title: Better Bamboo | Thatch
description: Turns bamboo into thatch, and the rest of the blocks to match the color.
body:
This Texture Pack turns bamboo into thatch, and also changes the rest of the blocks to match the color. It was created for version 1.21.4
I have already used it in several of my buildings and it is great for building roofs in country houses. For example → [Click](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/castle-6808690/)

![image](https://i.imgur.com/HrNknFb.jpeg)
